title: Reusable Bw Cinematic Emotional Portrait
sourceTitle: Black And White Cinematic Emotional Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable bw cinematic emotional portrait with general visual template with one clear subject, coherent setting, stable style, and clean composition. Create a vertical 4:5 black-and-white cinematic film portrait. 【Main subject】 Adult young woman, 【describe ethnicity / facial features / hairstyle / mood】, wearing 【black turtleneck / black wool coat / black tren. 【Second figure】 Adult young man, 【foreground blurred profile / background blurred silhouette / reflected figure / motion-blurred close figure】, weari. 【Scene】 【windy seashore / foggy moor / empty coastal road / rooftop in strong wind / rainy street through glass】, minimal background, low-contrast gr. Adult Subject: adult young woman with wind-tossed dark hair, pale skin, and restrained unresolved expression. Second Figure: adult young man as a heavily defocused background silhouette, never a clear second subject. Wardrobe: black wool coat over a minimal dark turtleneck. Scene: windy seashore with mist, low horizon, and sparse grayscale background. Motion Blur Rule: keep the woman face readable; apply slow-shutter blur only to hair ends, coat edges, shoulders, background streaks, and the second figure. Film Texture: black-and-white film scan, visible grain, low-contrast grayscale, soft highlights, and deep detailed shadows. Subject: Make adult young woman with wind-tossed dark hair, pale skin, and restrained unresolved expression the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in windy seashore with mist, low horizon, and sparse grayscale background. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use keep the woman face readable; apply slow-shutter blur only to hair ends, coat edges, shoulders, background streaks, and the second figure. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in black-and-white film scan, visible grain, low-contrast grayscale, soft highlights, and deep detailed shadows. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Create a vertical 4:5 black-and-white cinematic film portrait. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable bw cinematic emotional portrait with general visual template with one clear subject, coherent setting, stable style, and clean composition. Create a vertical 4:5 black-and-white cinematic film portrait. 【Main subject】 Adult young woman, 【describe ethnicity / facial features / hairstyle / mood】, wearing 【black turtleneck / black wool coat / black tren. 【Second figure】 Adult young man, 【foreground blurred profile / background blurred silhouette / reflected figure / motion-blurred close figure】, weari. 【Scene】 【windy seashore / foggy moor / empty coastal road / rooftop in strong wind / rainy street through glass】, minimal background, low-contrast gr. Adult Subject: adult woman with short wet hair, sharp nose bridge, and quiet emotional distance. Second Figure: blurred reflected male figure in rainy glass, present only as an emotional echo. Wardrobe: black trench coat, dark knit collar, and minimal metal earring. Scene: rainy street seen through glass with haze, reflected lights, and imperfect framing. Motion Blur Rule: preserve eyes, nose bridge, lips, and facial center line; blur only moving outlines, rain trails, and the reflected figure. Film Texture: arthouse monochrome photography, old film grain, soft haze, shallow depth of field, and unresolved relationship tension. Subject: Make adult woman with short wet hair, sharp nose bridge, and quiet emotional distance the clear hero subject. Scene and Context: Place the subject in rainy street seen through glass with haze, reflected lights, and imperfect framing. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in arthouse monochrome photography, old film grain, soft haze, shallow depth of field, and unresolved relationship tension. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Create a vertical 4:5 black-and-white cinematic film portrait.
